title: phaca conjuncta
intro: Phaca conjuncta, commonly known as  Phacelia, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. It is valued for its potential health benefits, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant. The therapeutic actions of Phacelia include its use as a demulcent to soothe irritated tissues and as an expectorant to ease respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Phacelia include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
intro_study: According to "Journal of the Indian Medical Association", phaca conjuncta benefits include improved vision in a few cases of cataract, correction of refractive errors in early myopia, control of progressive deteriorations in high myopic conditions, and healing capacity in allergic conjunctivitis.
